verse_text: Come, behold the works of the Lord, The wonders He wrought on the earth.

links.context: Just as the Scriptures speak of "false christs and false prophets" ([[MRK.13:22]]), here we have a counterfeit queen of heaven (see note at v. 8). The true queen of heaven is the Mother of God, seated at the right hand of her Son and King ([[PSA.45:9]]).

symbolic.title: Heaven and Earth: A Spiritual Perspective
